Willow's Loom

✦ Handcrafted Jewelry ✦

Welcome to Willow's Loom — where magic is made by hand and worn close to the heart. Every piece I create is crafted with intention, woven from moonlight, resin, and raw earth. I believe jewelry should tell your story, hold your energy, and feel like it was always meant for you.

Every purchase brings me one step closer to my dream — a life on the open road, creating under starlit skies. When you wear Willow's Loom, you're not just wearing jewelry. You're fueling a journey.

Custom Pieces

✦ made just for you ✦

✦ a few finished pieces for inspiration ✦

✦ How Custom Pricing Works ✦

Every custom piece is one of a kind — pricing is determined after we chat about your vision. Cost is based on:

✦ Materials used
✦ Complexity & time
✦ Shipping & handling
✦ Charm & hardware costs
✦ Size & length
✦ Personalization details

No payment required upfront — I’ll reach out with a quote before anything is made. 🤍

Request a Custom Piece

Fill this out and I’ll get back to you within 1-2 days ✦

About Me

✦ the maker behind the magic ✦

Hi, I'm Angie — the hands, heart, and soul behind Willow's Loom. I create handcrafted jewelry from my home studio, pouring intention into every piece I make. From resin moon pendants to wire-wrapped gemstones, each creation starts with a spark of magic and ends with something you can carry with you always.

I've always believed that the things we wear should mean something. That's why I take my time with every single piece — choosing materials that feel right, working with my hands until it's perfect, and sending each order out with love.

✦ The Dream ✦

Every purchase you make is helping me build toward something bigger — a life on the open road. My dream is to live in a van, travel freely, and create jewelry under open skies in every corner of this beautiful country. You're not just buying jewelry. You're part of the journey.

SizeTotal LengthChainFits Wrist

SizeTotal LengthFits Ankle

M9.5"8.5"–9"

💡 How to measure: Wrap a soft tape measure snugly around your wrist bone. Add 0.5" for a comfortable fit.
✦ Necklace Length

All necklaces · Handwoven crochet cord

✦ Willow's Loom necklaces are made to a standard length.
If you'd like a different length, tap a size below and a note will be added to your order — or write your own message.
Want a specific length? Tap one:
14.5"
Choker — sits high on the neck
16"
Collar — rests at the base of the neck
18–20"
Princess — standard length, sits at the collarbone
22–24"
Matinee — falls between collarbone and bust
28–36"
Opera — drapes to the bust or below

Return Policy

We want you to love your Willow's Loom piece. If for any reason you're not completely satisfied, we accept returns within 14 days of delivery.

To be eligible for a return, items must be unworn, undamaged, and in their original condition. Because each piece is handmade, we inspect all returns carefully.

To start a return, contact us through the form below with your order details and reason for return. Once your return is received and approved, a refund will be issued to your original payment method within 5–7 business days.

PLEASE NOTE
  • Shipping costs are non-refundable
  • Customer is responsible for return shipping
  • We do not accept returns on items showing signs of wear, damage, or alteration
